title: Breville Bold 2 Slice Toaster with High-Lift and Wide Slots | White and Silver Chrome [VTR037]
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: GLOSS TEXTURED DESIGN: With high shine chrome accents and illuminated controls for ease of use
2 SLICE CAPACITY: Variable width bread slots allow for both thick and thin slices
VARIABLE BROWNING CONTROLS: Let you pick your preferred shade of golden brown
INTUITIVE FEATURES: Lift & Look function allows you to check on your toast mid-cycle; High Lift function means smaller items can be removed easily without burning fingers
HELPFUL EXTRAS: Defrost, reheat and mid-cycle cancel functions, plus removable crumb tray, non-slip base and cord storage
description: From the manufacturer Timeless Look & Feel The stylish design features a glossy ridged textured finish with high shine chrome accents and illuminated controls for ease of use. The Perfect Slice Variable width slots and browning controls ensure bread, crumpets or bagels are just the way you like them. Rapid Boil The large 1.7 Litre capacity boils up to 8 cups at once. A removable, washable limescale filter keeps water clean and clear. Keep It Tidy Add some shine to your kitchen while also keeping it clean and tidy with cord storage and removable crumb tray.
